problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
hypothesis: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Enzymatic. Enzymatic depolymerization of specific polymer directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
